classes.reasoning: This is explicitly labeled as 'eCRF — COGNITIVE ASSESSMENT MODULE' with form number 'NEU-CRF-004 v1.1' and contains structured data-capture fields for cognitive assessments (CDR, MMSE, Falls Assessment) with patient code and visit scheduling elements. The Medidata Rave platform identifier and signature blocks confirm this is a case report form.

summary: This is an electronic Case Report Form (eCRF) designed to capture cognitive assessment data for study BIORCE-NEU-2022-004. The form includes three standardized assessment modules: Clinical Dementia Rating (CDR), Mini-Mental State Examination (MMSE), and Falls Assessment, to be completed at scheduled visits from baseline through week 78 and end of treatment.
